value.title: US stocks recover from tech tremors as oil prices fall
value.summary: Wall Street's main stock indices overcame an early bout of tech jitters Friday thanks to buy-the-dip traders, finishing mildly lower, while oil prices fell as shipping traffic resumed through the Strait of Hormuz.While US stocks retreated early, they were saved by investors swooping in to "buy the dip."
